html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Rotavirus schedule table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: First rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered
Second rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered
Third rotavirus dose from the primary series was administered

description.value: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D18.S.Rotavirus schedule table in the Immunization CPG
